_comment: Golden walk-forward Elo backtest metrics on the deterministic synthetic season in tests/test_ci_backtest.py (seed 42). If a model change shifts these beyond tolerance the test fails, showing the accuracy delta (plan §5.3). Regenerate intentionally when the change is expected.

props._comment: Walk-forward prop backtest on the deterministic synthetic log in test_ci_backtest.py (4 seasons, seed 7, eval >= 2023). Regenerated 2026-06-19 (model-upgrade Phase 3.1): default lines moved from the old, narrower DEFAULT_PROP_LINES to the live config.PROP_LINES (single source of truth), roughly doubling n and including the easier-to-clear shorter lines, which lowers log loss/brier.
